discussion: Reflexion significantly improves performance on multi-hop questions by allowing the agent to correct its trajectory after a failed first attempt. The structured evaluator ensures reliable scoring, and reflection memory provides cumulative feedback across attempts. However, this comes at the cost of higher latency and token usage.
